rules: Use Chivo for all headings (H1-H4). Apply negative tracking (letter-spacing: -0.02em) to H1 and H2 for a dense, technical feel.
Use IBM Plex Sans for body text, inputs, and standard UI elements.
Use JetBrains Mono for hashes, IDs, code blocks, metrics, and data table numerical columns.
No purple-on-white gradients. Stick to functional high-contrast colors.
True grey base surfaces (not pure black) to reduce eye fatigue.
Use a single saturated accent (Blueprint Blue) in a desaturated system.
Semantic colors must remain legible in dark mode. Use colored background with 10% opacity for badges.

grid.bento_density: Use CSS Grid with gap-md or gap-lg. For dashboards, utilize high-density grids (e.g., grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr)).
grid.data_tables: Use border-collapse. Keep density high but add padding-sm to td and th.

textures.noise: Apply a subtle SVG noise filter or repeating background-image (CSS grain) over the main app shell with opacity 0.02 to break digital flatness.
textures.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-filter: blur(16px) with var(--bg-glass) for top bars, sticky headers, and modals. Add a 1px top inner border (box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.05)) to glass surfaces.

interactions: Buttons: Translate Y by -1px on hover, active state translate Y by 0px. Scale down slightly on active (0.98).
Table Rows: Apply a subtle background shift (var(--bg-elevated)) on hover and a 2px left border highlight (var(--accent-primary)).
Entrance: Use CSS keyframes for staggered fade-in-up animations for dashboard tiles and list items.

app_shell.sidebar: Fixed width (240px). Surface color var(--bg-surface) with a right border var(--border-subtle). Navigation items should have subtle rounded corners, an SVG icon on the left, and a pronounced active state (solid subtle background with accent text color).
app_shell.topbar: Sticky, glassmorphic (var(--bg-glass) + blur). Contains page title and environment tools. Add a bottom border of var(--border-subtle). No fully transparent background.
app_shell.brand: Demo org displays as 'Northstar Air' in the UI. Backend org ID is 'org:harborline-demo'. Chivo font for premium feel.

golden_path_hero.description: A 6-step visual journey for the Home overview (Capture -> Replay -> Fix -> Proof -> Scenario -> Gate).
golden_path_hero.style: Use a horizontal flex or grid layout with CSS animated dashed lines connecting nodes. Nodes should be circular with monospace step numbers.
golden_path_hero.active_state: The 'current' step should glow with var(--shadow-glow) and use var(--accent-primary) border/background.
golden_path_hero.animations: Use CSS @keyframes to move the background-position of the dashed line gradient, simulating data flowing from left to right.

stat_tiles.style: Cards using var(--bg-surface), 1px solid var(--border-subtle), border-radius var(--radius-md). Padding var(--spacing-lg).
stat_tiles.content: Large primary metric in JetBrains Mono. Subtext in IBM Plex Sans (var(--text-secondary)). Subtle SVG icon in the top right.
stat_tiles.hover: Slight lift (-2px translate-Y) with var(--shadow-md) and border color shift.

setup_wizard_stepper.style: A multi-step layout. Left side: Vertical progress tracker with line connectors. Right side: The active form step content.
setup_wizard_stepper.forms: Inputs should have var(--bg-base) background, 1px var(--border-strong) border, changing to var(--accent-primary) on focus with a subtle box-shadow glow.
setup_wizard_stepper.feeling: Should feel like a serious enterprise setup. Dense form fields, clear descriptions, monospace IDs where applicable.

data_tables.style: Forensic-grade tables. Clean, dense. Row borders var(--border-subtle). No alternating row colors, rely on hover states.
data_tables.badges: Use semantic pill-shaped badges (border-radius: var(--radius-full)) for statuses (Pass, Fail, Warn, Replayable, Certified, Planned, Ingested). Text size xs, JetBrains Mono font. Background uses semantic-bg variables.

tech_stack_rules: CRITICAL: The target stack is VANILLA HTML/CSS/JS. DO NOT use React, JSX, Tailwind, or Shadcn UI.
Write all styles in standard CSS using the CSS variables defined in this guideline.
Use JavaScript to handle interactions, DOM manipulation, and view switching.
Ensure all CSS uses native features (CSS Variables, Flexbox, Grid, nested if supported by target standard or just flat). No build step required.
design_rules: NO AI SLOP. Avoid generic centered layouts, simplistic purple/blue gradients, and uniform mushy styling.
Ensure depth through layering (bg-base -> bg-surface -> bg-elevated) and crisp 1px borders, NOT heavy drop shadows.
Optical clarity: Always maintain high contrast. Avoid pure transparent backgrounds for text-bearing surfaces (especially headers/dropdowns).
Use data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) for testing. Example: data-testid='login-submit-button'.
Use inline SVG icons. Do NOT use emojis as icons.
Use a 'generic demo company' name instead of Harborline.
Don't cram elements. Even in high density, ensure padding scales proportionally (padding inside bordered containers is mandatory).
Add micro-interactions (hover, active, focus) to all clickable elements. Provide visual feedback.
